display.purpose: ATLAS wordmark, page-level hero titles, empty-state headings. EB Garamond only.

headline.purpose: Section headings on /about, major structural headings in rendered answers.

title.purpose: Conversation titles in sidebar, modal headings, source document names. Inter only.

body.purpose: All rendered legal answer text. 68ch max line length.

label.purpose: Timestamps, metadata, badge text. Uppercase only for very short strings.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Popovers, source tooltips, dropdowns. Communicates detachment from surface.

shadows.name: hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Focus ring for interactive elements. Teal halo, not shadow.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Standard easing. Entrances, state reveals, popover open.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Color and border transitions. Hover states.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action — send query, confirm, open chat. Caribbean Depth background.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Consultar jurisprudencia <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #1a7a8a; color: #fffef9; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 10px 22px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #228fa0; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(50% 0.13 196 / 0.18); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action — cancel, methodology link, new chat.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #1a140d; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 10px 22px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #ede8df; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(50% 0.13 196 / 0.18); }

components.name: Citation Badge
components.description: Inline legal source reference. Appears within rendered assistant answers. Click opens source popover.
components.css: .ds-badge-citation { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #f5eacc; color: #8a5700; border: 1px solid rgba(138,87,0,0.28); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7em; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; padding: 2px 8px; margin: 0 0.12em; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-badge-citation:hover { background: rgba(138,87,0,0.15); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(138,87,0,0.18); } .ds-badge-citation:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8a5700; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-badge-citation--missing { opacity: 0.38; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Chat Input
components.description: Primary interaction surface. Full-width, grows to 8 lines. Send icon button attached.
components.css: .ds-chat-input-wrap { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 8px; background: #fffef9; border: 1px solid #ddd5c5; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-chat-input-wrap:focus-within { border-color: #1a7a8a; } .ds-chat-input { flex: 1; background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #1a140d; resize: none; max-height: calc(8 * 1.65 * 0.9375rem); overflow-y: auto; } .ds-chat-input::placeholder { color: #9e9080; } .ds-send-btn { flex-shrink: 0; width: 32px; height: 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #1a7a8a; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-send-btn:hover { background: #ede8df; } .ds-send-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(50% 0.13 196 / 0.18); }

components.name: Conversation Item
components.description: Sidebar list item. Hover: Fog background. Active: Caribbean Mist background, Caribbean Depth text. No border stripe.
components.css: .ds-conv-item { width: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 2px; padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-conv-item:hover { background: #ede8df; } .ds-conv-item--active { background: #d1ecf0; } .ds-conv-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1a140d; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; max-width: 100%; } .ds-conv-item--active .ds-conv-title { color: #1a7a8a; } .ds-conv-time { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 400; color: #6b5c4e; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

components.name: Source Popover
components.description: Appears near a clicked citation badge. Shows document title, metadata grid, and source excerpt.
components.html:
Sent. CE 25000-23-24-000-2008 — Sala Plena

Sección
Argumentación jurídica
Fecha
12 mar 2019

Texto fuente

El dominio público marítimo-terrestre comprende la ribera del mar hasta la línea de bajamar escorada, así como las playas marítimas...
components.css: .ds-popover { position: absolute; z-index: 50; max-width: 340px; min-width: 240px; background: #fffef9; border: 1px solid #ddd5c5; border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(26,20,13,0.10), 0 1px 2px rgba(26,20,13,0.06); animation: ds-popover-in 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) both; } @keyframes ds-popover-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-4px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .ds-popover-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a140d; margin: 0 0 8px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-popover-meta { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; column-gap: 8px; row-gap: 2px; margin: 0 0 10px; } .ds-popover-meta dt { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #9e9080; } .ds-popover-meta dd { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; color: #1a140d; margin: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-popover-section { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #8a5700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 6px; } .ds-popover-body { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #6b5c4e; margin: 0; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 4; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; border-top: 1px solid #ede8df; padding-top: 8px; }

components.name: ATLAS Wordmark
components.description: The product name rendered in EB Garamond. Never use a logomark or icon — the word is the identity.
components.css: .ds-wordmark { font-family: 'EB Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #1a140d; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1; }

narrative.overview:
ATLAS is named for the atlas — the bound collection of maps that made the world legible. Its design system follows that metaphor structurally, not decoratively. The color palette is drawn from antique cartographic plates: warm parchment grounds, Caribbean water teal, near-black map ink. The typography pairs a classical serif (the text of historical atlases) with a precise modern sans (the instrument of efficiency). The result is an interface that feels authoritative without feeling archaic — a research tool, not a portal.

The primary surface is the conversation. Everything else is infrastructure. The sidebar, navigation, and chrome are subordinate — they exist to hold the exchange, not to compete with it. Dense legal text needs room to breathe and a typographic system that renders it legible.

Dark mode inverts the metaphor from parchment + ink to deep sea + moonlight: a #0c1621 navy background with warm cream text and a brighter teal accent. Both modes share the same structure — the tokens swap, the architecture stays.
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutrals, never cool grays — parchment, not hospital white
Caribbean teal as the one active voice — rare, purposeful, unmistakable
Charter Amber for citations only — legal sources are a first-class visual element
EB Garamond for ATLAS identity and headings; Inter for all functional text
Flat surfaces at rest; shadow only as a response to state
Reduced motion respected globally; no gratuitous animation

rules.name: The Ink & Water Rule
rules.body: Every interactive element is water (teal). Every resting surface is parchment or paper (warm neutral). These two families never blend — no teal backgrounds for content surfaces, no warm neutrals on interactive elements.

rules.name: The One Amber Rule
rules.body: Charter Amber appears only on citation badges and their hover states. If you are about to apply amber to anything else, stop. Choose teal or ink instead.

rules.name: The Two-Font Discipline
rules.body: EB Garamond is the name of the system. Inter is the voice of the system. Never mix them on the same semantic level. Don't introduce a third font.

rules.name: The 68ch Rule
rules.body: Legal text rendered in assistant answers must never exceed 68ch. Wide justified blocks in dense prose are a usability failure, not a design choice.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear when an element detaches from the surface — on hover for interactive cards, on open for floating layers.

dos: Use Caribbean Depth for all interactive affordances — the active state speaks in one voice.
Render legal text with Inter body at 0.9375rem, 1.65 line-height, maximum 68ch.
Use EB Garamond exclusively for ATLAS-brand moments: wordmark, page-level titles, empty-state headings.
Keep all surfaces warm — Parchment, Paper, Fog — even in light/neutral contexts.
Treat citation badges as first-class: every badge has a popover, a hover state, and a focus state.
Implement all three theme modes via CSS custom properties with a .dark class and prefers-color-scheme media query.
Use prefers-reduced-motion to gate all animations.
Keep sidebar active state visually clear through background color and text color change — never through a border stripe.
donts: Don't build this to look like Legis or SUIN-Juriscol — dense portal layouts with nested tables and no whitespace.
Don't build this to look like ChatGPT or Gemini — generic sans-serif everywhere, thin input at the bottom, no identity.
Don't use navy + gold — the most legible first-order reflex for 'legal tool' and the fastest way to look undifferentiated.
Don't use editorial dark mode (dark background + large white serif) — it's the second-order reflex for 'AI legal tool'.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent. Active states use background fills.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Charter Amber and Caribbean Depth are single colors.
Don't use glassmorphism. ATLAS surfaces are opaque.
Don't use cool grays — replace #64748B with Faded Ink #6b5c4e family.
Don't put EB Garamond on body text or UI labels — below 1.2rem it loses legibility.
